full_text:
Qin Ming
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Qin Ming. Killed by Zhang Wen as a part of a fake defector scheme. Qin Ming is a fictional character. Qin Ming was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
